title: Adapters Layer

classes.name: hookAdapter
constants: PLATFORMS: { cursor: {name, configDir, detector}, 'claude-code': {name, configDir, detector}, codex: {name, configDir, detector} }
methods: detectPlatform(cwd): string|null — checks cwd then homedir for .cursor/.claude/.codex dirs
resolveConfigRoot(platformId, cwd): string|null — returns cwd or homedir with platform config dir
loadAdapter(platformId): Adapter|null — factory: returns cursor/claudeCode/codex module
mergeJsonFile(filePath, patch, {markerKey}): object — deepMerge + write with _evolver_managed marker, atomic via .tmp
deepMerge(target, source): object — recursive object merge, arrays overwrite
copyHookScripts(destDir, evolverRoot): string[] — copies 3 evolver scripts to destDir, chmod 755
appendSectionToFile(filePath, marker, content): boolean — append markdown section if marker absent
removeEvolverHooks(filePath, {markerKey}): boolean — filter evolver-session/evolver-signal commands from hooks JSON
removeHookScripts(hooksDir): number — deletes 3 evolver script files, returns count removed
setupHooks({platform, cwd, force, uninstall, evolverRoot}): Promise — orchestrates detect+load+install/uninstall

classes.name: claudeCode
methods: buildClaudeHooks(evolverRoot): object — returns hooks config: SessionStart/PostToolUse(matcher:Write)/Stop each pointing to .claude/hooks/*.js
buildClaudeMdSection(): string — markdown snippet with EVOLVER_MARKER for CLAUDE.md injection
install({configRoot, evolverRoot, force}): object — creates .claude/settings.json (mergeJsonFile), copies hook scripts, injects CLAUDE.md section
uninstall({configRoot}): object — removes evolver hooks from settings.json, removes scripts, strips CLAUDE.md section

classes.name: codex
methods: buildCodexHooksJson(evolverRoot): object — returns hooks config: SessionStart/PostToolUse/Stop pointing to .codex/hooks/*.js
ensureConfigToml(codexDir): boolean — adds [features] codex_hooks=true to config.toml if absent
buildAgentsMdSection(): string — markdown snippet with EVOLVER_MARKER for AGENTS.md injection
install({configRoot, evolverRoot, force}): object — creates .codex/hooks.json (mergeJsonFile), copies scripts, updates config.toml, injects AGENTS.md
uninstall({configRoot}): object — removes evolver hooks from hooks.json, removes scripts, strips AGENTS.md section

classes.name: cursor
methods: buildHooksJson(evolverRoot, isUserLevel): object — returns {version:1, hooks: {sessionStart/afterFileEdit(matcher:Write)/stop}} pointing to .cursor/hooks/*.js or ./hooks/*.js for user-level
install({configRoot, evolverRoot, force}): object — detects isUserLevel via os.homedir(), creates .cursor/hooks.json (mergeJsonFile), copies scripts
uninstall({configRoot, evolverRoot}): object — removeEvolverHooks(hooks.json) + removeHookScripts

classes.name: EvolverSessionStart
methods: findEvolverRoot(): string|null — checks EVOLVER_ROOT env, relative path, ~/skills/evolver
findMemoryGraph(evolverRoot): string|null — checks MEMORY_GRAPH_PATH env, memory/evolution/memory_graph.jsonl
readLastN(filePath, n): object[] — reads last N lines from JSONL file
formatOutcome(entry): string — formats entry as '[+/-/?] date score=X signals=[...] note' (max 200 chars)
main(): void — reads last 5 memory entries, writes JSON {agent_message, additionalContext} to stdout
classes.io: stdin: session context JSON | stdout: {agent_message, additionalContext}

classes.name: EvolverSignalDetect
constants: SIGNAL_KEYWORDS: {perf_bottleneck, capability_gap, log_error, user_feature_request, recurring_error, deployment_issue, test_failure}
methods: detectSignals(text): string[] — keyword scan over lowercased text, returns unique signal names
main(): void — reads stdin edit event (content/file_content/diff), runs detectSignals, writes {additional_context, additionalContext} or {} if no signals; 1500ms timeout guard

classes.name: EvolverSessionEnd
methods: findEvolverRoot(): string|null — same as session-start
findMemoryGraph(evolverRoot): string|null — same as session-start, creates dir if needed
getGitDiffStats(): object — execSync git diff --stat + git diff, returns {stat, summary, diffSnippet(2000 chars), hasChanges}
detectSignals(text): string[] — regex-based signal detection (7 types + user_improvement_suggestion)
recordToHub(outcome): boolean — POST via curl to EVOMAP_HUB_URL/a2a/evolution/record with Bearer token
recordToLocal(graphPath, outcome): boolean — fs.appendFileSync JSONL entry to memory_graph.jsonl
main(): void — getGitDiffStats → detectSignals → recordToHub (fallback recordToLocal) → stdout {followup_message, stopMessage, additionalContext}; 7000ms timeout guard
classes.io: stdin: session end JSON | stdout: {followup_message, stopMessage, additionalContext}

implicit_interface.name: Adapter
methods: install({configRoot: string, evolverRoot: string, force: boolean}): {ok: boolean, platform?: string, files?: string[], skipped?: boolean}
uninstall({configRoot: string, evolverRoot?: string}): {ok: boolean, removed: boolean}

key_relationships: claudeCode depends_on hookAdapter (mergeJsonFile, copyHookScripts, appendSectionToFile, removeHookScripts)
codex depends_on hookAdapter (mergeJsonFile, copyHookScripts, appendSectionToFile, removeHookScripts)
cursor depends_on hookAdapter (mergeJsonFile, copyHookScripts, removeEvolverHooks, removeHookScripts)
claudeCode registers EvolverSessionStart as SessionStart hook
claudeCode registers EvolverSignalDetect as PostToolUse hook
claudeCode registers EvolverSessionEnd as Stop hook
codex registers EvolverSessionStart as SessionStart hook
codex registers EvolverSignalDetect as PostToolUse hook
codex registers EvolverSessionEnd as Stop hook
cursor registers EvolverSessionStart as sessionStart hook
cursor registers EvolverSignalDetect as afterFileEdit hook
cursor registers EvolverSessionEnd as stop hook
EvolverSessionEnd calls Hub API via curl (optional)
important_notes: All adapters share the same hook script files (evolver-session-start.js, evolver-signal-detect.js, evolver-session-end.js) copied into platform-specific directories. hookAdapter uses atomic file writes (write to .tmp then rename). Cursor adapter supports user-level install (homedir). Codex adapter additionally manages config.toml [features] codex_hooks=true. Claude Code and Codex use EVOLVER_MARKER in md files (CLAUDE.md / AGENTS.md). Cursor has no md file injection. All adapters guard against double-install via _evolver_managed JSON key. Scripts use stdin/stdout JSON protocol compatible with Claude Code hook API.
